utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I saw this movie once where there was a door and no one knew what was behind it , and when they finally got it open millions and millions and millions of bugs came pouring out and they feasted on human flesh .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: You know , it would not kill you to respect your wife privacy !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Joey . Joey , something feels weird and not good weird . I do not ... Whoa ! !

emotion_cause.span: 5_something feels weird and not good weird .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Do not worry , Ok ? When my sisters were pregnant they got every weird feeling in the book , it was always nothing .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Absolutely . But we will stop by the hospital just to be sure . I will page Ross on the way .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Okay Rach ... Rach ... Rach look at me , look at me , everything gonna be fine , trust me . Trust me . Take my hand . Here we go .
